symptom: an infant drooling and refusing feeds after swallowing a safety pin
hook: an open safety pin was stuck in the food pipe with its point upward
whatYouSee: An open safety pin stuck in the food pipe.
whyItMatters: An open sharp pin can tear the food pipe so it must come out quickly.
treatment: It is removed urgently by endoscopy.
takeaway: An open safety pin in the food pipe is a swallowed pin needing urgent removal.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with an infant drooling and refusing feeds after swallowing a safety pin.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And an open safety pin was stuck in the food pipe with its point upward.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed safety pin

👀 What you see:
An open safety pin stuck in the food pipe.

🦴 Why it matters:
An open sharp pin can tear the food pipe so it must come out quickly.

💊 Treatment:
It is removed urgently by endoscopy.
